diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createFactory, createMiddleware, Factory
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, types, utils/url
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/factory/, /src/hono/, /src/hono-base/
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createFactory and createMiddleware for creating and composing handlers.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/route/, /src/context/, /src/utils/url/
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides utilities to get matched routes and path information.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents, WSContext, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/websocket/, /src/context/, /src/types/
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides defineWebSocketHelper for creating WebSocket handlers.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/cookie/, /src/utils/cookie/, /src/context/
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides utilities for getting, setting, and deleting cookies.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/testing/, /src/client/, /src/context/, /src/hono/
+- Safe summary: Testing helper provides testClient for client-side testing of Hono apps.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/adapter/, /src/context/
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper provides env utility for accessing runtime environment variables.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/css/, /src/helper/html/, /src/jsx/, /src/utils/html/
+- Safe summary: CSS helper provides styling utilities for server-rendered JavaScript with classnames and keyframes.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify
+- Reads as: none (internal utils)
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/css/common.ts, /src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities used by both server and client implementations.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/proxy/, /src/http-exception/, /src/utils/headers/
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper provides proxy functionality with RFC compliance.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/dev/, /src/hono/, /src/types/, /src/utils/
+- Safe summary: Dev helper provides utilities for inspecting and debugging routes.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/html/, /src/utils/html/
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides utilities for escaping and formatting HTML content.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/ssg/, /src/helper/ssg/plugins/
+- Safe summary: SSG helper provides static site generation utilities and plugins.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultExtensionMap, ToSSGResult, ToSSGOptions
+- Reads as: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, /src/helper/ssg/plugins/, /src/helper/ssg/middleware/, /src/client/
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic for fetching routes and generating static content.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/ssg/, /src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, /src/router/
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including path manipulation and route filtering.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, /src/helper/ssg/utils/, /src/context/, /src/types/
+- Safe summary: Middleware for SSG detection and disabling.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/streaming/, /src/helper/streaming/stream/, /src/helper/streaming/sse/, /src/helper/streaming/text/
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper provides streamSSE and streamText for streaming responses.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, /src/helper/streaming/, /src/utils/stream/
+- Safe summary: Base stream API for streaming responses with error handling.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: /src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, /src/helper/streaming/, /src/utils/html/, /src/utils/stream/
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming API for event-based streaming.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.
